mechanism_narrative: Near-zero federal funds rates eliminate discount rate headwinds for equity valuations, generating positive forward returns as capital allocates to risk assets.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns are negative in >55% of observations when FEDFUNDS < 0.25% over a 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Unemployment rates exceeding 6.0 percent signal persistent labor market slack that suppresses corporate earnings growth, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over a quarter.
failure_condition: Rank IC exceeds 0.05 or positive returns dominate when UNRATE > 6.0% over a 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous month-over-month increases in retail sales and housing starts confirm broad-based consumer demand recovery, driving positive equity returns as earnings expectations are revised upward.
failure_condition: Joint positive momentum in RSAFS and HOUST fails to predict positive 20-day returns in >60% of cases over a 5-year sample.

mechanism_narrative: Expanding industrial production indices reflect improving manufacturing throughput that reduces supply chain bottlenecks, generating positive short-term equity returns within one week.
failure_condition: Signal loses predictive power (Rank IC < 0.02) during monetary tightening cycles or when inflation exceeds 3.0%.

mechanism_narrative: Elevated consumer price indices combined with near-zero policy rates create negative real yields that force central banks to tighten, triggering negative forward equity returns over a quarter.
failure_condition: Positive 60-day returns occur in >50% of instances when CPIAUCSL > 260.0 and FEDFUNDS < 0.50%.

mechanism_narrative: Month-over-month growth in total nonfarm payrolls signals expanding economic activity that supports corporate revenue streams, producing positive forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: PAYEMS momentum shows no statistical correlation (p > 0.10) with 20-day forward returns across a 10-year out-of-sample test.

mechanism_narrative: Quarterly GDP growth falling below 1.0 percent indicates severe demand contraction that immediately pressures equity valuations, generating negative returns within one week.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns are positive in >65% of observations when GDPC1 growth < 1.0% over a 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Divergent trends where industrial production rises while unemployment falls confirm a synchronized supply-labor recovery, driving positive equity returns as margin expansion accelerates.
failure_condition: The joint signal fails to outperform a baseline market model (Sharpe < 0.5) or produces negative returns in >55% of triggered cases over a 4-year sample.
